original_image_tags: Aged, yellowed manila document tag with a hole-punched top, showing reversed or bleed-through text and two ink stamps.

elements.description: Two visible stamps. A blue diagonal ink stamp reads 'L 22 11:56 AM RECEIVED - MAIL ROOM F B I'. A red ink stamp reads 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION COMMUNICATIONS SECTION MAILED JUL 23 1947 P.M.' Additionally, a handwritten word 'Copy' is visible in the upper center, and a piece of tape with a hole punch is in the upper left.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific, detailed verbatim text from stamps ('L 22 11:56 AM RECEIVED - MAIL ROOM F B I', 'MAILED JUL 23 1947 P.M.') and additional visual elements (handwritten 'Copy', tape) that Description A does not mention, indicating they describe different levels of detail or potentially different content.
